<type>(<scope>): <short description>

# <body>
# <footer>
# ------------------------
# Guidelines:
# - Title must be under 50 characters.
# - Separate title from body with a blank line.
#
# Allowed Types:
#   feat     (New feature for the user)
#   fix      (Bug fix)
#   chore    (Routine tasks, project init, file moving)
#   build    (Dependencies, Cargo.toml, build tools)
#   refactor (Code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature)
#   docs     (Documentation changes only)
#
# Scopes for this project: 
#   backend, frontend, email, webhook, deps, config
# ------------------------
# Remember to add "Closes #<issue>" in the body/footer if applicable!
